violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. -Observed boxes of food on floor of walk in freezer.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Observed doors and sides of appliances need to be cleaned.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. -Observed ice dumped in hand sink. Hand sinks are only for washing hands.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Observed oil on floor by fryer.
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
